limitations: defer_provider_unavailable is a string action value returned by recommended_action(); it is not a Rust enum variant — callers must match the string.
The ProviderGated arm does not change routing logic, only the returned action label.
modulation/pressure.rs retains a field named refuse_unsafe (f64 bias parameter); this is a separate, unrelated concern and was intentionally not renamed.
reason_codes.rs description update is cosmetic; the reason code identifier itself is unchanged.
